title: Terralith, Incendium, Nullscape Biomes Names
description: Terralith, Incendium, Nullscape Biomes Names Lang fix
body:
If you are using a minimap, you probably noticed that the biome names are not set. This Resource Pack fixes this error. And it sets a name for each biome.
*****
curseforge version: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/terralith-incendium-nullscape-biomes-names](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/terralith-incendium-nullscape-biomes-names)
*****
Without the resource pack:

![Without the resource pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1c2d4a0e932f6142eca1bbb2e67f20320aab838.png)



With the resource pack:

![With the resource pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/313fc67c755d65cf94b9366fb8fee052ce9dda23.png)
*****
I don't know if the Terralith/Incendium/Nullscape author will fix this bug in future versions, but this is a simple temporary solution!
